beverages.name: Babyccino
beverages.description: A frothy, steamed milk beverage for kids, often topped with a sprinkle of cocoa or cinnamon.

beverages.name: Cappuccino
beverages.description: Fluffy steamed milk, a shot of espresso, and a dusting of cocoa. A classic Italian delight.

beverages.name: Chai Latte
beverages.description: Warming spices and creamy goodness. Like a hug in a mug.

beverages.name: Hot Chocolate
beverages.description: Silky, rich, and deeply chocolatey. Pure comfort in a cup.

beverages.name: Flat White
beverages.description: Smooth, creamy, and just the right amount of coffee kick.

beverages.name: Iced Latte
beverages.description: Smooth espresso, chilled milk, and a touch of sweetness.

beverages.name: Cold Brew
beverages.description: Bold, smooth, and refreshingly cold. A coffee lover's dream.

beverages.name: Batch Brew
beverages.description: A large batch of smooth, balanced coffee, brewed to perfection.

beverages.name: Latte
beverages.description: Creamy, smooth, and perfectly balanced. A timeless classic.

beverages.name: Long Black
beverages.description: Bold, intense, and full of flavor. A true coffee lover's choice.

beverages.name: Macchiato
beverages.description: Espresso with a dollop of frothy milk. A perfect balance of strong and smooth.

beverages.name: Matcha Latte
beverages.description: Vibrant green tea blended with creamy milk. A refreshing and energizing treat.

beverages.name: Mocha
beverages.description: A delicious blend of espresso, chocolate, and steamed milk. A sweet indulgence.

beverages.name: Piccolo
beverages.description: Espresso with a small amount of steamed milk. A concentrated burst of flavor.

beverages.name: Pumpkin Spice Latte
beverages.description: A seasonal favorite, blending espresso with pumpkin, spices, and creamy milk.

beverages.name: Taro Latte
beverages.description: A sweet and creamy blend of taro root and milk, with a subtle nutty flavor.

beverages.name: Turmeric Latte
beverages.description: A warm and earthy blend of turmeric, spices, and creamy milk. A golden delight.
